case_title: INTERNATIONAL JEWELERS CORP. VS DOMINGUEZ MARTIN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,681.15 FILED BY INTERNATIONAL JEWELERS CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ MARTIN DOMINGUEZ ANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL JEWELERS CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ MARTIN DOMINGUEZ ANA $1,681.15 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,732.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ MARTIN HEARING SET FOR APR-22-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-22-1992, DENIED
SAN MATEO EXECUTION FOR DOMINGUEZ RETURNED RELEASED BY PLTF.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $870.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $490.66 ACCRUED INTEREST, $172.50 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ MARTIN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ MARTIN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ MARTIN DOMINGUEZ ANA
